content:
🌟 cursify | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of React and Next.js web applications through custom cursor animations and dynamic UI components.
✨ Key Features: • Cursor animation library • React and Next.js compatibility • TypeScript support • Reusable UI components • Animation and interactive elements
📖 Summary: This repository provides a collection of reusable UI components and animations for React and Next.js applications, focusing on enhancing user experience with dynamic visual effects. It includes components for animations, interactive elements, and layout utilities, designed to be easily integrated into modern web development projects.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
